_note: Lock all fields marked [FIXED]. Only modify fields marked [VARIABLE].

subject.scale_hint: [FIXED] small object, approx. 10cm tall, occupying 15–20% of frame height

environment.surfaces: [FIXED] light oak coffee table, cream linen sofa in background
environment.props: [FIXED] small linen book stack to the left, dried pampas grass in vase to the right

camera.framing: [FIXED] rule of thirds, product on central axis

lighting.type: [FIXED] soft natural window light from the left
lighting.fill: [FIXED] subtle right-side fill to avoid deep shadows on product

style.color_palette: [FIXED] warm neutrals – cream, sand, warm white, muted sage
style.render_quality: [FIXED] photorealistic, sharp product, film grain subtle

negative_prompts: [FIXED] no people, no text, no logos, no watermarks, no cartoon, no CGI look, no overexposure, no clutter
